item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Summer Shoe SALE! - 06/24/2026 8:00pm EDT to 07/03/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 191 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Shop our Summer Sales!! Each brand has their own discounts Up to 50% off Accessories are 20% off Socks 20% off Come take care of your tootsies we'll help you search for deals & steals!
item.dc:creator: Kuebler Shoes
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Shoe SALE! on Jun 24, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and summer shoe sale.

item.title: Glitter & Glue: Patriotic Welcome Mat - 06/29/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/29/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for "Glitter & Glue: Patriotic Welcome Mat," a special adult craft session hosted by Tiffin-Seneca Public Library as part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program "Unearth a Story" and the America 250 celebration. On Monday, June 29, at 10:00 a.m. and 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room, you can design and paint your own festive welcome mat, perfect for celebrating summer holidays with a patriotic flair. Please register for one of the sessions, as space and supplies are limited, by calling 419-447-3751 or visiting our online calendar at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Glitter & Glue: Patriotic Welcome Mat on Jun 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include adult craft session and design and paint.

item.title: Pop up lunch - 06/29/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/29/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come see us for lunch.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Pop up lunch on Jun 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include pop up lunch and Food & Drink.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/29/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/29/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and Arts.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/29/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/29/2026 4:00pm EDT

Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin's wild goose chase and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/29/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/29/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.

item.title: Glitter & Glue: Patriotic Welcome Mat - 06/29/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/29/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for "Glitter & Glue: Patriotic Welcome Mat," a special craft session at Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Monday, June 29, at 10:00 a.m. and 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. As part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story” and the America 250 celebration, participants will design and paint their own festive welcome mats, perfect for celebrating summer holidays with red, white, and blue flair. Space and supplies are limited, so please register for one of the sessions by calling 419-447-3751 or visiting our online calendar at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/. Celebrate America 250 in style!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Glitter & Glue: Patriotic Welcome Mat on Jun 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer reading program.

item.title: Full Moon Hike - 06/29/2026 9:00pm EDT to 06/29/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose as we walk under the light of the “Strawberry Moon.”  This walk will last about 1 to 1 ¼ hours and qualifies for the Walking Stick Program.  Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Full Moon Hike on Jun 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Outdoors and full moon hike.

item.title: Celebrate 30 Years—Park Bingo - 06/30/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/30/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3362 Infirmary Rd, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA To celebrate Seneca County Park Districts 30th Anniversary, join Linda Rose as we hike the trails hoping to find things on our bingo cards. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate 30 Years—Park Bingo on Jun 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Parks & Rec and 30 years.

item.title: Dinner at The Turntable - 06/30/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/30/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 116 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Turntable has graciously agreed to host a reservations-only dinner for Seneca Proud in celebration of Pride month. Proceeds from the night will benefit Seneca Proud and contribute to our annual campaign and festival this fall. Call today to make your reservation 419-455-1056. Seating is limited and you don't want to miss out!
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Dinner at The Turntable on Jun 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include pride month and reservations only.

item.title: Fourth of July party - 07/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 07/02/2026 12:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1700 Duchess Ln Lot 12, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Please join us for our Fourth of July celebration, taking place on Wednesday, July 1, 2026.
item.dc:creator: Bel-Mar Boat Landing
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Fourth of July party on Jul 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include fourth of july and fourth of july party.

item.title: Pop-up! Calm Compass Travel at Your Legacy FCU - 07/01/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/01/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Travel Pop-Up at Your Legacy FCU! Join us for a special pop-up event featuring CCT Trips, bus journeys hosted by Toni Cessna of Calm Compass Travel! Discover curated mini vacations and stress-free group travel experiences. Learn about upcoming trips you’ll be talking about for years. Get your questions answered and sign up on-site. Stop by, explore your next getaway, and start planning your next adventure—no passport required!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Pop-up! Calm Compass Travel at Your Legacy FCU on Jul 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include group travel and legacy federal credit union.

item.title: Coffee Connect - 07/01/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/01/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come meet with the management of Your Legacy Federal Credit Union every first Wednesday of the month at 11AM. This is a chance for members to have a cup of coffee and come voice their concerns, praises, or just ask questions. Eligible Members of the community are welcome to learn more about the "Credit Union Difference" and find out how our 70+ year Seneca County institution can help you with your current finances and future plans!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Coffee Connect on Jul 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include finances and legacy.

item.title: Rubber Ducky Wednesday - 07/01/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/01/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Rubber Ducky Wednesday” on Wednesdays, July 1, 8, 15, and 22 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Babies age birth to 35 months and their caregivers are invited to a story time on July 1, July 8, and July 15 with books, songs and lap bounces. On July 22, join the Library for a play date with toys and books for the babies to enjoy together. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Rubber Ducky Wednesday on Jul 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and story time.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/01/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/01/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Washington Street Outfitters
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin's wild goose chase and Seasonal & Holiday.

Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family friendly and interactive experience.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/01/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/01/2026 4:00pm EDT

Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and Arts.

item.title: Michele & Friends Workshop - 07/01/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/01/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 113 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come join your friends to create your own personalized project. It will be a fun time out with new and old friends! Select any design, check out the "design" page of the website for options or scroll through past projects on the FB feed. Everyone can choose a different project.
item.dc:creator: Rustic Flair & Brush
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Michele & Friends Workshop on Jul 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include personalized project and rustic flair & brush.

item.title: Happy Birthday America Storytime - 07/02/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/02/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the "Happy Birthday America! Storytime" on Thursday, July 2 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library. Celebrate the spirit of Independence Day through engaging stories, songs, and simple crafts, designed for young children and their caregivers. This family-friendly event is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story” and the America 250 celebration. For more details, visit the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or check our website at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Happy Birthday America Storytime on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and tiffin, ohio.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family activities and interactive experience.

item.title: America 250 Local Author Visit: J. Edward Richey - 07/02/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/02/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Thursday, July 2 at 6:00 p.m. for the America 250 Local Author Visit featuring J. Edward Richey, a lifetime resident, author, and publisher. As part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story” and the America 250 celebration, Richey will discuss how national and global events have influenced Tiffin and Seneca County, while highlighting his six-book historical series, including A Photo History of Tiffin and Seneca County Ohio – Volumes 1 and 2, and A Photo History of Northwest Ohio – Volumes 1-4. Attendees will have the opportunity to purchase signed copies, with payment options including credit cards, PayPal, Venmo, pre-paid Visa or MasterCard, GooglePay, and ApplePay (no cash or checks). For more information, contact the library at (419) 447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: America 250 Local Author Visit: J. Edward Richey on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include america 250 local author visit: j. edward richey and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 07/02/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/02/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Park & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free public event and thursday night tunes.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 07/02/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/02/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Parks & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free and public.

item.title: Financial Fitness Friday - 07/03/2026 8:30am EDT to 07/03/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join our Financial Counselor Rusti Claydon for Financial Fitness Friday, a new monthly event for our membership for FREE walk-in assistance and education surrounding your financial concerns! The first Friday of each month, Rusti has cleared her schedule to allow for members of the credit union to stop in and ask questions about their situation, ask for insights into how we can assist and how to better utilize Your Legacy Federal Credit Union offerings to their benefit! Not a member? Rusti can get you started with just a $5 minimum initial share. See you there!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Financial Fitness Friday on Jul 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free walk-in assistance and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: July 4th (250 Years) Celebration - 07/04/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/04/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 621 E Market St #1734, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The car show will be the first event at 9am, following will be concerts, inflatables, yummy food, and then boom boom double the fireworks at 10pm
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Parks & Recreation
